description: Validate ee/appliance directory structure exists with expected top-level folders.
Run packer validate on Ubuntu base template with required variables provided.
Build OVA artifact in CI and confirm artifact file naming includes version and build ID.
Build QCOW2 artifact in CI and confirm artifact file naming includes version and build ID.
Verify build metadata is embedded and retrievable from published release manifest.
Verify build-images.sh fails fast when required inputs are missing.
Boot fresh VM from OVA artifact and verify first-boot initialization completes successfully.
Boot fresh VM from QCOW2 artifact and verify first-boot initialization completes successfully.
Verify pinned k3s version is installed exactly as configured in release metadata.
Verify Kubernetes API reports Ready state within expected bootstrap timeout.
Verify Flux controller installs successfully on first boot.
Verify Flux can authenticate and reconcile from configured release source.
Verify single-node overlay file only overrides required keys and does not duplicate full helm values.
Render root helm chart with appliance single-node overlay and confirm templates resolve without errors.
Verify application deployment reaches healthy status after first GitOps sync.
Verify bootstrap-site.sh performs non-interactive setup and exits successfully for a new site.
Verify release manifest schema rejects missing required fields.
Verify publish-release.sh writes release record and channel pointer updates atomically.
Verify scheduled rebuild workflow creates a fresh image artifact on cadence.
Verify scheduled rebuild workflow updates stable install pointer to latest approved patch.
Verify stale-build guard blocks publication when base image age threshold is exceeded.
Upgrade app from release N to N+1 by GitOps desired-state update and verify workload rollout success.
Verify upgrade-site.sh app-only mode performs preflight checks before advancing release.
Verify upgrade-site.sh app-only mode fails safely and leaves current release unchanged on preflight failure.
Verify compatibility matrix prevents unsupported app and k3s version combinations from upgrade execution.
Verify host image upgrade flow enforces maintenance window acknowledgement before execution.
Execute app rollback to previous release pointer and verify service health is restored.
Execute image rollback to prior appliance artifact and verify node returns to service.
Verify image scan confirms no site secrets are present in artifact filesystem.
Verify bootstrap secret injection path works and does not persist plaintext secrets in logs.
Verify every release artifact has generated sha256 and signature metadata.
Verify deployment manifests generated for release use digest-pinned image references.
Render HA overlay against helm chart and verify expected scheduling/high-availability settings are present.
Execute scripted single-node to 3-node expansion in test environment and verify embedded etcd control-plane quorum.
Verify workloads continue serving during post-expansion node failover scenario.
Verify operator runbook includes install, upgrade, rollback, and HA migration sections with tested commands.
Verify CI pipeline includes and enforces image build, smoke validation, release packaging, and publish stages.
Verify CI smoke test boots built artifact and confirms k3s readiness and app deployment health checks.
Promote release from candidate to stable without rebuilding artifacts and verify channel pointer behavior.
Verify signed offline bundle workflow can import release artifacts and complete bootstrap without external network dependency.
Verify signed offline bundle workflow can perform app upgrade between two mirrored releases.
Verify upgrade automation rejects upgrade attempts outside supported policy window (older than N-2).
Verify upgrade automation rejects skipped-minor upgrades and requires sequential N to N+1 progression.
Negative test: corrupt artifact checksum and confirm bootstrap or upgrade process refuses artifact usage.
Negative test: GitOps source unavailable at bootstrap time and confirm retry/failure behavior is documented and safe.
Negative test: attempt unsupported direct customer host tweak path and confirm documented unsupported behavior.
Acceptance test: fresh install from latest stable artifact to working application completes within target onboarding window.
